file: 1389_Gong 等 - 2025 - Co nanoparticles confined in mesopores of MFI zeolite for selective syngas conversion to heavy liqui.txt

experiments.description: 在513K、2.0MPa压力下，使用H2/CO/Ar=9:9:1的合成气，在Co基催化剂上进行费托合成反应，生成液态烃燃料。通过调控Co纳米颗粒在MFI分子筛微孔和介孔中的分布，研究其对产物碳数分布和选择性的影响。
experiments.text_snippet: 0.33 g catalyst (40–80 mesh) was located at the constant temperature zone of a stainless-steel reactor (inner diameter 10 mm). The catalyst was reduced with 50 mL min–1 H2 gas at 673 K for 5 hours with a heating rate of 3 K min–1. After the temperature was cooled to 373 K, syngas (H2/CO/Ar = 9:9:1) with a flow rate of 20 mL min–1 was introduced into the reactor. Then, the temperature and pressure were raised to 513 K and 2 MPa, respectively, to start the Fischer-Tropsch synthesis reaction.

Catalyst composition.value: Co nanoparticles on MFI zeolite (Na-OMMZ, H-OMMZ)
Catalyst composition.original: Co nanoparticles on MFI zeolite (Na-OMMZ, H-OMMZ)

Product.original: Liquid hydrocarbon fuels (gasoline C5–C11, jet C8–C16, diesel C10–C20, wax C21+)

Catalyst stability.original: Stable for 120 h (CO conversion and selectivity maintained)
